Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Sam Fareed, Esq. (916.800.8457) of United Citizen Law for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF FIDA MOHAMMAD Mohammad is withdrawn by moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

PLAINTIFF FIDA MOHAMMAD'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Off calendar. The motion was not "served and filed" at least 16 court days before the hearing date. (See CCP 1005(b).)
